scope.boundary_note: The 30 fixture seed entities are loaded into the entities table by scripts/load_synthetic_fixtures.py. The 140-node research universe remains a catalog until later ingestion tasks materialize it as entities.

assertions: Every fixture seed entity returns HTTP 200 from /v1/entities/{entityId}.
Each response includes the required human_summary key set.
rollback: Revert T500 repository/test/status changes and regenerate release artifacts.
